term: What I Was Taking Responsibility For
englishDefinitions: the thing or situation that the speaker accepted responsibility for in the past
used to clarify the specific issue or action being discussed
persianTranslation: آن چیزی که مسئولیتش را به عهده می‌گرفتم
کاری که داشتم مسئولیتش را می‌پذیرفتم
موضوعی که مسئولیتش را قبول می‌کردم
examples: I explained what I was taking responsibility for.
That was what I was taking responsibility for, not the whole project.
She asked what I was taking responsibility for in the report.
